response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with over 15 years of industry experience, directly matching the core stack of TypeScript, Node.js, and React. He possesses rare, specific experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, alongside solid secondary skills in Java and cloud deployment, making him an exceptionally strong fit for this Senior Fullstack role.
strengths: Extensive experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and modern engineering practices like TDD and CI/CD.
Direct, hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) development.
Strong architectural background with cloud platforms (AWS), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and database optimization.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, though his extensive Node.js and testing background mitigates this.
Heavily invested in side projects and open-source (GISCollective), which demonstrates passion but could potentially compete for his time.
Many concurrent overlapping roles and freelance projects in his early career, which makes verifying exact full-time timelines slightly complex.
